name: Closure of Complete Input Trajectories
description: Theorem stating that the set of complete input trajectories ITZ of a system is closed under translation and concatenation.

elements.text: If Z ∈ DSYSTEMS and f ∈ ITZ, then f → t ∈ ITZ for any t ∈ TZ+.
If Z ∈ DSYSTEMS, {f1, f2} ⊆ ITZ, and t ∈ TZ+, then CTN(f1, t, f2) ∈ ITZ.
